Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Establishes a twenty year retirement option for certain deputy sheriffs employed by the city of New York
Summary: Establishes a twenty year retirement option for certain deputy sheriffs employed by the city of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to establishing a twenty year retirement option for certain deputy sheriffs employed by the city of New York
